Session 1 	Session 2 	Session 3 	Session 4 	Session 5 	Session 6
M A R K C O M P L E T E
In this training, Teresa is going to walk you step by step on how to find a venue and book it for your event. She will lay out some easy to follow steps
you can follow to get your first venue booked and make it easier than you ever expected. Teresa; who has been doing events for years, is the perfect
person to learn from when it comes to your small group, workshop or mastermind event.
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
Go to eventup.com or cvent.com and research some local venues that would fit your desired event size.
Make sure the space you choose fits your event size appropriately and isn’t too big or too small.
Do an in‐person walkthrough of the event if possible.
Review & Finalize logistics like WiFi, Food & Beverages, Room Block ﴾Optional﴿, Room Set Up, Signage, etc.
Finish your contract negotiations with the venue of your choice.
